PORT.description: Port the app listens on (set automatically by Railway)

GOOGLE_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for AI processing

USE_VERTEX.description: Set to 'true' to use Vertex AI instead of Gemini API

VERTEX_PROJECT.description: Google Cloud project ID for Vertex AI

VERTEX_LOCATION.description: Google Cloud region for Vertex AI (e.g., us-central1)

GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS_JSON.description: Google Cloud service account JSON credentials (base64 or raw JSON)

QDRANT_URL.description: Internal URL for the Qdrant service
